name: compliance auto-refresh: emits summary {frameworks_attempted, succeeded, failed, paywalled_head_only, total_tokens} at completion
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && for id in a b; do echo "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" > ".claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/$id.txt"; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" --report 2>out.txt && grep -E "summary.*attempted=2.*succeeded=2" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
